from django.test import TestCase
from .models import Event, Group

class QuerySetPickleTests(TestCase):
    def test_pickle_query(self):
        qs = Event.objects.filter(group__name='test')
        pickled = pickle.dumps(qs.query)
        restored = pickle.loads(pickled)
        self.assertEqual(str(qs.query), str(restored))
